response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment via on-screen text 'PHOENIX PRAYER' and '作詞・作曲：中村未来'. 2. Identified the performers Omaru Polka and Shishiro Botan via visual context. 3. Used the search tool to locate the official Japanese lyrics for 'PHOENIX PRAYER' by Mirai Nakamura, which were found on the Moegirl website. 4. Structured the JSON with appropriate timestamps and fields.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song 'PHOENIX PRAYER' by the VTubers Omaru Polka and Shishiro Botan during Omaru Polka's 2026 birthday celebration.

scenes.description: Introductory segment before the performance. No vocal music.
The performance of the song 'PHOENIX PRAYER'. The song is performed by Omaru Polka and Shishiro Botan.
